option.value: I'm getting this error seemingly inconsistently for one player yes the other no [13:40:44 ERROR]: Could not pass event AsyncPlayerChatEvent to FeatherChatInjector v1.0.0 java.util.UnknownFormatConversionException: Conversion = '§' at org.bukkit.event.player.AsyncPlayerChatEvent.setFormat(AsyncPlayerChatEvent.java:105) ~[purpur-api-1.21.4-R0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar:?] at featherchatinjector-1.0.0.jar/dev.zerek.featherChatInjector.listeners.AsyncPlayerChatListener.onChat(AsyncPlayerChatListener.java:31) ~[featherchatinjector-1.0.0.jar:?] at featherchatinjector-1.0.0.jar/dev.zerek.featherChatInjector.FeatherChatInjector.lambda$onEnable$0(FeatherChatInjector.java:16) ~[featherchatinjector-1.0.0.jar:?] at co.aikar.timings.TimedEventExecutor.execute(TimedEventExecutor.java:80) ~[purpur-api-1.21.4-R0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar:?] at org.bukkit.plugin.RegisteredListener.callEvent(RegisteredListener.java:70) ~[purpur-api-1.21.4-R0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar:?] at io.papermc.paper.plugin.manager.PaperEventManager.callEvent(PaperEventManager.java:54) ~[purpur-1.21.4.jar:1.21.4-2412-9249a2c] at org.bukkit.plugin.SimplePluginManager.callEvent(SimplePluginManager.java:628) ~[purpur-api-1.21.4-R0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar:?] at io.papermc.paper.adventure.ChatProcessor.post(ChatProcessor.java:378) ~[purpur-1.21.4.jar:1.21.4-2412-9249a2c] at io.papermc.paper.adventure.ChatProcessor.process(ChatProcessor.java:85) ~[purpur-1.21.4.jar:1.21.4-2412-9249a2c] at net.minecraft.server.network.ServerGamePacketListenerImpl.chat(ServerGamePacketListenerImpl.java:2472) ~[purpur-1.21.4.jar:1.21.4-2412-9249a2c] at net.minecraft.server.network.ServerGamePacketListenerImpl.broadcastChatMessage(ServerGamePacketListenerImpl.java:2582) ~[purpur-1.21.4.jar:1.21.4-2412-9249a2c] at net.minecraft.server.network.ServerGamePacketListenerImpl.lambda$handleChat$12(ServerGamePacketListenerImpl.java:2254) ~[purpur-1.21.4.jar:1.21.4-2412-9249a2c] at net.minecraft.util.FutureChain.lambda$append$1(FutureChain.java:25) ~[purpur-1.21.4.jar:1.21.4-2412-9249a2c] at java.base/java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture$UniAccept.tryFire(CompletableFuture.java:718) ~[?:?] at java.base/java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture$Completion.run(CompletableFuture.java:482) ~[?:?] at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) ~[?:?] at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) ~[?:?] at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583) ~[?:?] [13:40:44 INFO]: [Not Secure] {featherclans_clan_formatted}{featherclans_clan_role}X MBelloc: ola
Couldnt we just make \\u00A7 the COLOR_CHAR? or i guess string? would that do the same thing?
actually cancel that. we need to use § and cant replace it.
